fixtures.label: Commentary-heavy clip
fixtures.task_intent: Speech-led highlight ranking with strong transcript salience
fixtures.notes: Use to validate transcript-heavy highlight cues and review alignment.

fixtures.label: Action-heavy gameplay clip
fixtures.task_intent: Fast combat clip for proposal, semantic, novelty, and rerank validation
fixtures.notes: Primary gameplay benchmark for the hf_multimodal stack.

fixtures.label: Noisy multi-speaker clip
fixtures.task_intent: Stress ASR and diarization-adjacent review conditions
fixtures.notes: Use for transcript robustness and later pyannote-style extensions.

fixtures.label: Music-heavy clip
fixtures.task_intent: Audio-heavy clip with weaker speech cues and stronger visual/audio salience dependence
fixtures.notes: Use for non-speech salience and future AST-style trials.

fixtures.label: Hard negative motion clip
fixtures.task_intent: Visual motion without strong highlight value
fixtures.notes: Use to guard against false positives from action-like movement.
